company.name_jp: 日産車体コンピュータサービス株式会社
company.name_en: NISSAN SHATAI COMPUTER SERVICE Co., Ltd.

research_notes: President 森猛 and full officer list confirmed from company profile page. Founded 1987-01-01 as spin-off from Nissan Shatai's IT dept. 100% Nissan Shatai subsidiary. 282 employees. Capital 1億円. Multiple offices across Japan plus Thailand. ISO9001 certified for 20+ years with special award in 2023. AMO Tier1 vendor for Nissan Motor.
